# GitHub Copilot cold-start instructions (K-HARDEN-8 cross-CLI alignment)

**Start here:** read `AGENTS.md` — the canonical cross-agent contract. It
defines the full read order (§2), risk classes (§5), restricted surfaces (§6),
the PR-only workflow (§14a), the audit doctrine (§9), the obligation ledger
(§16), and the Karpathy coding principles (§13). This file does not restate
those rules.

Copilot obeys that one contract identically to every other platform, free to
use its own native strengths to realize it — the Layer 1 / Layer 2 model in
`AGENTS.md` §2.

If anything here contradicts `AGENTS.md`, **`AGENTS.md` wins**. This file exists
so Copilot's repo-instructions feature picks it up automatically.
